title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 387.426 - Nondiscrimination policy required — accommodation of service animals — no additional charges for persons with disabilities
text:
387.426.  Nondiscrimination policy required — accommodation of service animals — no additional charges for persons with disabilities. — 1.  A TNC shall adopt a policy of nondiscrimination with respect to riders and potential riders and notify TNC drivers of such policy.
  2.  TNC drivers shall comply with all applicable laws regarding nondiscrimination against riders or potential riders.
  3.  TNC drivers shall comply with all applicable laws relating to accommodation of service animals.
  4.  A TNC shall not impose additional charges for providing services to persons with physical disabilities because of those disabilities.
(L. 2017 H.B. 130)
